title: Verdi: Highlights
description: Powerful scenes from Verdi's greatest operas including Don Carlo and La Traviata.
body: A compilation of Vitaly Yushmanov's most acclaimed Verdi performances. This album features highlights from his roles as Rodrigo and Germont.
tracks: Verdi: Don Carlo - Per me giunto
Verdi: Don Carlo - O Carlo, ascolta
Verdi: La Traviata - Di Provenza il mar
Verdi: Rigoletto - Cortigiani, vil razza dannata
